## Automated Tests Required

### S7-02: useAuthStore — Logic

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/stores/auth-store.test.ts`

**What to test**:

```
initAuth() — session exists
  Given: mock getSession returns { user: { id: 'uid-1', email: 'a@b.com' } }
  Then: userId = 'uid-1', email = 'a@b.com', isAuthLoading = false

initAuth() — no session
  Given: mock getSession returns { session: null }
  Then: userId = null, isAuthLoading = false

initAuth() — onAuthStateChange SIGNED_IN
  Given: initAuth called; mock fires onAuthStateChange('SIGNED_IN', session)
  Then: userId updated to session.user.id

initAuth() — onAuthStateChange SIGNED_OUT
  Given: userId is set; mock fires onAuthStateChange('SIGNED_OUT', null)
  Then: userId = null

signIn(email) — success
  Given: mock signInWithOtp resolves without error
  When: signIn('test@example.com') called
  Then: pendingEmail = true, authError = null

signIn(email) — network error
  Given: mock signInWithOtp rejects with error
  When: signIn('test@example.com') called
  Then: pendingEmail = false, authError set to error message

signOut()
  Given: userId is 'uid-1'
  When: signOut() called
  Then: mock supabase.auth.signOut() called; userId = null; email = null

SUPA-AC-05: expired OTP
  Given: onAuthStateChange fires with AuthError code 'otp_expired'
  Then: authError set to descriptive message, no crash, userId remains null
```

**Edge cases to cover**:
- `initAuth()` called when localStorage has a corrupted session token → `getSession()` returns null → graceful null state
- `signIn()` called with empty string → should not call `signInWithOtp` (validate before calling)
- `onAuthStateChange` fires `TOKEN_REFRESHED` → userId remains unchanged (idempotent)
- `supabase.auth.getSession()` throws (network down) → `isAuthLoading` still becomes false; no crash

**Estimated test count**: ~10 unit tests

---

### S7-04: useDataSyncStore — Logic + Integration

**Test file path**: `tests/unit/stores/data-sync-store.test.ts`

**What to test**:

```
syncGame() — logged in, sync success (SUPA-AC-06)
  Given: useAuthStore.userId = 'uid-1'; mock supabase insert returns no error
  When: syncGame(mockCompletedGame) called
  Then: syncStatus transitions idle → syncing → synced
        lastSyncedGameId = mockCompletedGame.id
        No localStorage chess:unsynced:* key written

syncGame() — not logged in (offline queue write)
  Given: useAuthStore.userId = null
  When: syncGame(mockCompletedGame) called
  Then: localStorage has key chess:unsynced:<game.id>
        syncStatus = 'error' (or 'idle' — whichever design decides for unauthenticated)
        No supabase insert called

syncGame() — logged in, insert fails (SUPA-AC-07)
  Given: useAuthStore.userId = 'uid-1'; mock insert returns error
  When: syncGame(mockCompletedGame) called
  Then: localStorage has key chess:unsynced:<game.id>
        syncStatus = 'error'

flushUnsyncedQueue() — success (SUPA-AC-08)
  Given: localStorage has chess:unsynced:<id1> and chess:unsynced:<id2>
         mock insert returns no error
  When: flushUnsyncedQueue() called
  Then: both localStorage keys removed
        supabase insert called twice (once per game)

flushUnsyncedQueue() — one insert fails
  Given: localStorage has two games; mock insert fails for second game
  When: flushUnsyncedQueue() called
  Then: first key removed (success); second key remains (retry next login)

Idempotency (SUPA-AC-09)
  Given: same game UUID inserted twice via syncGame
  Then: ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING used (verify insert query includes conflict clause)

Queue overflow (UNSYNCED_QUEUE_MAX = 50)
  Given: 50 games already in localStorage queue
  When: syncGame(game51) called while offline
  Then: oldest entry removed; chess:unsynced:<game51.id> written
        console.warn called

SUPA-AC-13 — syncGame is non-blocking
  Given: supabase insert is delayed (mocked with setTimeout)
  When: syncGame called (without await)
  Then: syncStatus = 'syncing' immediately; does not block caller

Formula 2 — UNSYNCED_QUEUE_MAX guard
  Given: UNSYNCED_QUEUE_MAX = 50
  Then: exactly 50 entries allowed; 51st triggers oldest-entry drop
```

**Edge cases from GDD**:
- localStorage unavailable (private browsing) → `_writeToUnsyncedQueue` silently swallows `localStorage.setItem` errors; no crash
- `flushUnsyncedQueue` called with empty queue → no-op, no Supabase calls
- `syncGame` called with malformed `CompletedGame` (missing fields) → TypeScript catch at compile time; no runtime guard needed

**Formula verification** (from GDD Formula 3 — Sync Retry Backoff):
- `SYNC_BASE_DELAY_MS = 1_000`, `SYNC_MAX_DELAY_MS = 30_000`
- Attempt 0: 1s delay; Attempt 1: 2s; Attempt 5: 30s (capped)
- Unit test: verify `retryDelayMs(0) === 1000`, `retryDelayMs(5) === 30000`

**Estimated test count**: ~12 unit tests

---

## Manual QA Checklist

### S7-01: Supabase Project Setup — Config/Data

**Verification method**: Grep commands + file inspection + dev server start

Checklist:
- [ ] `grep -r "createClient" src/ --include="*.ts"` → exactly 1 match in `src/lib/supabase.ts`
- [ ] `grep -r "SERVICE_ROLE" src/` → 0 matches
- [ ] `.env.example` exists at repo root with `VITE_SUPABASE_URL=` and `VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=` lines (no values)
- [ ] `index.html` CSP `connect-src` directive includes `https://*.supabase.co` and `wss://*.supabase.co`
- [ ] Dev server starts without TypeScript errors after adding `src/lib/supabase.ts`
- [ ] `npm list @supabase/supabase-js` → package present at ^2.x

**Evidence path**: No separate evidence file needed — grep output verified during smoke check.

---

### S7-03: DB Migration — Config/Data

**Verification method**: SQL file review; optional local Supabase test

Checklist (SQL review — can be done without running Supabase):
- [ ] `supabase/migrations/` directory exists
- [ ] At least one SQL file creates `game_sessions` table with all columns from ADR-0011 schema
- [ ] At least one SQL file creates `skill_scores` table with all columns from ADR-0011 schema
- [ ] Both tables have `ALTER TABLE ... ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY`
- [ ] Both tables have `CREATE POLICY ... USING (user_id = auth.uid())`
- [ ] No `SECURITY DEFINER` functions present
- [ ] CHECK constraints match GDD valid values (result, player_color, end_reason, ai_difficulty range, score range)

Optional (requires local Supabase + Docker):
- [ ] `supabase start` and `supabase db push` execute without error
- [ ] User A query returns 0 rows from User B's data (RLS isolation — SUPA-AC-11, SUPA-AC-12)

**Evidence path**: `production/qa/evidence/s7-03-migration-evidence.md`

---

### S7-05: Route Guards — Integration

**Verification method**: Manual browser navigation + optional Playwright

Checklist:
- [ ] Navigate to `/history` while not logged in → redirected to home (SUPA-AC-10)
- [ ] Redirected URL includes `?login=required` query param
- [ ] Navigate to `/history` while logged in → navigation proceeds without redirect
- [ ] On fresh page load: no flash redirect before `isAuthLoading` resolves (visible flicker check)
- [ ] `App.vue` calls `authStore.initAuth()` in `onMounted` — verify via source inspection

**Evidence path**: `production/qa/evidence/s7-05-route-guards-evidence.md`

---

### S7-06: Sign In UI — UI

**Verification method**: Manual walkthrough + screenshot

Checklist:
- [ ] Sign-in screen renders with email input field and "Send Magic Link" button
- [ ] Email input has `type="email"` (browser validation)
- [ ] Button disabled while `isAuthLoading = true` (spinner or disabled state)
- [ ] After submit: "Check your email" state displays the email address submitted (SUPA-AC-01 UI)
- [ ] When `authError` is set: error message text is visible (not color-only) (SUPA-AC-05 UI)
- [ ] Email input touch target ≥ 44px height (DevTools check) — WCAG AA
- [ ] "Send" button touch target ≥ 44px height
- [ ] "Use a different email" button touch target ≥ 44px height
- [ ] No hover-only state changes (mobile has no hover)
- [ ] Sign-out button visible when logged in; calls `authStore.signOut()` (SUPA-AC-04 UI)

**Evidence path**: `production/qa/evidence/s7-06-sign-in-ui-evidence.md`
**Who must sign off**: Developer (advisory for v0)

---

### S7-07: PostGameReview Sync Badge — UI

**Verification method**: Manual walkthrough + screenshot

Checklist:
- [ ] Complete a game → PostGameReview mounts without waiting for sync (SUPA-AC-13)
- [ ] "Saving…" badge visible while sync is in flight (`syncStatus = 'syncing'`)
- [ ] "Saved" badge visible after successful sync (`syncStatus = 'synced'`)
- [ ] "Not saved" badge visible when sync fails (`syncStatus = 'error'`) — review still accessible
- [ ] Badge transitions without layout shift on review screen
- [ ] `aria-live="polite"` present on badge element (screen reader notification)
- [ ] Review content (move list, scores) fully accessible regardless of sync state

**Evidence path**: `production/qa/evidence/s7-07-sync-badge-evidence.md`

*If Supabase not configured in dev env: complete a game without valid env vars → badge shows "Not saved" (error state). This is sufficient to verify the badge renders.*

---

### S7-08: ADR-0011 → Accepted — Spike/Validation

**Verification method**: On-device test (real iPhone required)

Checklist:
- [ ] Build deployed to GitHub Pages (or accessible via ngrok)
- [ ] PWA installed to iPhone Home Screen
- [ ] Email entered; "Send Magic Link" tapped → "Check your email" state displayed
- [ ] Magic Link email received; tapped on iPhone
- [ ] PWA opens with `#access_token` hash fragment
- [ ] `useAuthStore.userId` is set → player shows as logged in (SUPA-AC-02 on-device)
- [ ] If hash fragment test fails: PKCE alternative documented in ADR-0011 Decision section
- [ ] ADR-0011 status updated from `Proposed` to `Accepted`
- [ ] Control manifest updated to include ADR-0011 coverage

**Evidence path**: `production/qa/evidence/s7-08-adr-0011-accepted-evidence.md`

*This story is Nice to Have — skip if no real iPhone available for this sprint. Document the skip in active.md and carry to Sprint 8.*

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before QA hand-off for Sprint 7:

1. App launches without crash (`npm run dev` + open in browser — no console errors)
2. All 341 baseline tests still pass: `npx vitest run`
3. New unit tests pass: `npx vitest run tests/unit/stores/`
4. TypeScript compiles without errors: `npx tsc --noEmit`
5. Complete a game → PostGameReview still displays normally (no regression from sync wiring)
6. Navigate to `/history` while not logged in → redirected to home (route guard works)
7. Sign-in screen reachable and renders email form without crash
8. Dev server starts without env var errors (supabase.ts initializes with undefined env vars → should not crash at import time)

*Run via `/smoke-check sprint` after all Must Have stories (S7-01~S7-05) are implemented. Do not run before implementation is complete.*

---

## Playtest Requirements

No playtest sessions required for Sprint 7.

The Supabase stories are infrastructure/persistence — "feel" qualities are not applicable. Auth and sync behavior is validated through manual QA checklists above. Post-Sprint 7, a playtest should be scheduled for Sprint 8 (Game History screen) to validate the first cross-session UX.

---

## Regression Risk: Stories That Touch Existing Code

| Story | Files Modified | Regression Risk | Check |
|-------|---------------|-----------------|-------|
| S7-05 Route Guards | `src/router/index.ts` | **Medium** — existing routes may be affected if guard has a logic error | All existing routes still navigate correctly |
| S7-05 Route Guards | `src/App.vue` | **Low** — `onMounted` addition only | App still mounts, no double-init |
| S7-07 Sync Badge | `src/views/ReviewView.vue` | **Low** — additive badge element only | PostGameReview analysis/scores unaffected |
| S7-04 Data Sync | `src/stores/auth.ts` | **Low** — `flushUnsyncedQueue()` call on SIGNED_IN | Auth state machine still correct |

---

## Definition of Done — Sprint 7

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence
- [ ] **S7-02**: `tests/unit/stores/auth-store.test.ts` exists and all tests pass (BLOCKING)
- [ ] **S7-04**: `tests/unit/stores/data-sync-store.test.ts` exists and all tests pass (BLOCKING)
- [ ] **S7-01, S7-03**: Grep/SQL checks verified (documented in evidence or inline)
- [ ] **S7-05**: Route guard manual check documented
- [ ] **S7-06, S7-07**: Screenshot evidence at specified evidence paths
- [ ] **S7-08**: On-device result documented (or skip documented) — advisory
- [ ] Total test count: 341 (baseline) + ~22 new store tests ≥ 363 pass
- [ ] Smoke check passed (`/smoke-check sprint` run after Must Have stories complete)
- [ ] QA sign-off: APPROVED or APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS
- [ ] No regressions in existing PostGameReview or router behavior
- [ ] Code reviewed via `/code-review` before each story is marked done
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` via `/story-done`
